channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: NBA The Run will be getting a campaign mode, roadmap revealed
item.content:encoded:
A couple of weeks back Play By Play Studios released its multiplayer 3v3 arcade basketball game NBA The Run, in which players meet on street basketball courts from around the world to play basketball matches with varying rules. While it is a decent game, some of the content felt light at launch for NBA The Run. But now Play By Play Studios has revealed the roadmap for the NBA The Run, and one of the big additions will be Game Time, a campaign mode. But it won’t be available until 2027.

Recently, a new patch was released addressing a lot of issues and you can get the full details at the end of this post. Next on the roadmap is another update coming in July that will add three more NBA players. Then in August the first season will start and that is called Summer Heat. Summer Heat will last until September, bringing with it some legendary NBA players, the Championship Belt for players to earn over the season, a drive camera angle, a comms wheel to communicate with teammates, a practice mode letting you try out different rulesets across stadiums. There will be two new rulesets added as well which are Block Party and All The Fire. Block Party will take away a point from opponents for each successful block, while All The Fire will award an additional point for fire shots. A new New York City court will be added, there will be more items added to the shop, and the developers are also aiming to add Leaderboards during Summer Heat.

In the future, Play By Play Studios will be looking to add ranked modes and ladders, and voice chat so players can talk to each other. The campaign mode is one of the big additions that Play By Play will be looking to add to NBA The Run, with the campaign to be available both in solo and multiplayer modes. Details are scarce at the moment on what the campaign will include but the aim is to release it in Spring 2027.

NBA The Run June 25th Patch

Player Specific Changes

  • Improved attributes for Trae Young and DJ 
  • Reduced start up animation on DJ’s jumpshot to be more in line with other players 
  • Fixed issue with Zion’s dunk where the ball didn’t visually go through the hoop 
  • Steph now uses correct dunk at long range
  • Polished animations for Giannis, El Gigante and Wemby blocks 
  • Improved LeBron idle
  • Fixed bug that lists Bobbito’s ITZ ability as Ankle Breaker but in game he is assigned as Deep Threat, game and UI now match, he is Ankle Breaker
  • Improved Street Legend / IP Character attributes to make them more viable players / opponents 
  • Player attribute updates based on player feedback – Cade, SGA, Bam, Brunson and Wemby

Gameplay Changes

  • Increased nearby defenders effect on jumpshots to make shooting in traffic more difficult 
  • Tuned delays for Guard and Protect Ball abilities 
  • Tuning pass on XP & CRED rewards 
  • Kamikaze dunk ending no longer flips 
  • Add Icon / Targeted player switching in KO Solos Defense. Uses L1 + X or O as input for intended targets. 
  • Reduced stealer movement speed and increased energy cost for steal to balance based on community feedback 
  • Reduced near hoop radius for block to increase chances of high skill goaltending 
  • Increased odds of OTH, extended range of OTH, reduced errant OTH loose ball distance 
  • Tuned rim bounce to avoid ball landing on top of the backboard 
  • Added 2 Good Shot outcomes to increase variety and make the outcome less predictable

Visual Changes

  • Hit reactions look less cartoony now
  • Polished shove recoil animation set 
  • Polished run animations for big / large players  
  • Updating fallback meshes of the apartment walls in Tenement to fix gaps around windows 
  • Fixed lighting channels on ball in Intros

Ruleset Changes

  • Oop City and Dunkfest rulesets are now set to Rare 
  • Pickup ruleset now set to Common

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed issue with softlocking that was being caused by players simultaneously forfeiting a match 
  • Fixed issue where players could start a new ability / animation while in ankle break animation 
  • Prevent button inputs during loading screen transitions 
  • Fixed issue where players can move around during Intro & Outro Sequences 
  • Fixed player stats system crash when party data is missing 
  • Fixed map randomization crash when both team’s party data is missing
  • Fix issues w/ Bobbito’s shorts in Intros to remove material overrides / visual glitches  
  • Fix for tooltips in Matchmaking appearing below the 16:9 space on 16:10 monitors 
  • Fix for French / German text in the locker 

User Interface Changes

  • Hide ready checkmarks in the Front End for AI / Bots 
  • Clear baller portrait highlights when showing the carousel to prevent multiple highlights being shown 
  • Fill Teammates option no longer enabled if switching from KO Friends
  • Removed outdated unblock button
  • Fixed issue where players were getting PBP-004 error during the matchmaking carousel after queuing into KO Friends with fill with previous crewmates 
  • Fix case clicking off a button on PC with mouse once selected breaking navigation with cursor keys 
  • Fixed issue where Fill Teammates was enabled in Solos, game now checks state for Fill Teammates in all modes 
  • Hide Crew invite notification if the invite has been responded to in the Social Hub
  • Several fixes to Social Hub scroll bar and issues around the mouse cursor interfering with other controls 
  • Disable actions in home screen until loading completes
  • Prevent character changes occurring visually when in the Profile Screen
  • Fixed issue where Ready status wasn’t updating when switching Game Modes
  • Refresh the KO Friends code when returning from a Match 

Stats Updates

  • Corrected stat calculation for most played character time
  • Time played now reflected in HHSS rather than seconds to make Time Played more clear in Profile Menu
  • Treat blocked dunks / alley oops the same as failed dunks / alley oops, and don’t score them as dunks / alley oops
  • Credit steal / intercept only if the play results in a turnover 
  • Putbacks no longer count as Alley Oops 
  • Don’t increment rebound stat for throw-in pick up

Audio Updates

  • Removed the logic for ShotMade UI sounds from the HypeMeter widget and moving it to when scores occur to allow for for Dunk specific UI sounds
  • Far shots and non-dunk shots now trigger the respective UI sfx events
  • The existing “Dunk_Success” (called already in the Dunk + AlleyOop ability) audio has the UI sounds in that event now
  • New Dunk fades happen in BP_AudioSetup, taping into Dunk Start and Dunk End events
  • New audio created and implemented for style / dribble moves 
  • Bigger dunk sounds, will duck music + other sfx for it
  • Updated shot made UI sounds to have built in delays (removing it from the animations in order to use data on which type of shot)
  • Style moves and Dunk UI sounds
  • Music slowdown event for Alley Oop 
  • Added Bobbito VO hooks for time running out as the game clock winds down

Other Updates

  • Reduced controller vibration on XBOX

Source: NBA The Run official website/Steam



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/27/nba-the-run-will-be-getting-single-player-campaign-mode-roadmap-revealed/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
